lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: Hey it's the Hero! Wow! You're amazing, how on earth did you manage to tackle those two juvinates and Gadderanks? And the town is lovely, you've done a great job!

lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: Not that it makes much difference but my name's Sergiu. Like all the other survivors here, I just try to make do and get through each day at a time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you like your town?

lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.

lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help out?

lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you.

lines.speaker: Sergiu
lines.text: I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
